meta.title: Who is my substitute doctor? | Find your substitute GP instantly
meta.description: Enter your street name and instantly see which GP you can visit when your own doctor is absent. Free for patients.

home.heroSubtitle: Search your GP practice and instantly see which doctor is on duty today.
home.searchPlaceholder: Search your GP practice (e.g. Huisartsenpraktijk Milad)
home.step1Text: Type the name of your GP practice or use your location.
home.step2Text: Instantly see which practice is on duty today.
home.step3Text: You immediately have the right address and phone number.
home.regionsDescription: {count} participating GP practices in {cities} {citiesLabel}. Choose your city to see all practices.
home.locationDesc: We use your location to show the nearest GPs. Your location stays on your device.
home.locationLoadingSub: We are searching for practices near you.
home.locationNotSupported: Location is not supported by this browser.
home.locationInaccurate: Your location is too inaccurate to show nearby practices. Search by name or postal code.
home.locationNone: No practices found near you. Search by name or postal code.
home.locationDeniedHelp: Click the 🔒 lock icon next to the URL →
home.searchSuffix: Or search by practice name above.

praktijk.waarnemerDesc: When your own GP is absent, you can visit the following substitute:
praktijk.waarnemerNone: No substitutes have been linked to this practice yet.

footer.description: Quickly find which GP practice is on duty when your own doctor is absent.
footer.disclaimer: Note: when in doubt, always check directly with your GP practice or the substitute. In case of emergency, call <emergency>112</emergency> or the <postTitle>out-of-hours GP service</postTitle> in your area.

aanmelden.claimDesc: Search your GP practice and claim it in 30 seconds.
aanmelden.searchPlaceholder: Search your practice (e.g. De Gors Purmerend)

portaal.loginDesc: Log in to manage your practice page.

hapBanner.message: Urgent complaints that can't wait? Call the out-of-hours GP service in your area.
hapBanner.generic: Call your own GP — the answering machine will provide the correct number.
